title: Fresh As Funk
tagline: The Culture. The Sound. The Lifestyle.
about_body:
Fresh As Funk is the cultural lifestyle brand within the IIIGLOBE ecosystem — rooted in music, fashion, street culture, and the creative underground. It's not a trend. It's a frequency.

Spanning apparel, editorial content, and curated experiences, Fresh As Funk bridges the gap between artistry and architecture — between the record crate and the boardroom.

items.name: The Crate
items.description: Curated music selections, vinyl culture features, and deep cuts from across genres and eras.

items.name: Street Editorial
items.description: Fashion, culture photography, and editorial content documenting the creative landscape.

items.name: Drop Culture
items.description: Limited releases, collaborations, and brand partnerships born from authentic creative energy.
